scripts.verify-cad: cd 5-Applications/text-to-cad && ./.venv/bin/python -c "import build123d; import OCP; print('CAD dependencies OK')"
scripts.setup-science-light: uv venv .venv-science && . .venv-science/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements-optional-science.txt
scripts.setup-science-all: uv venv --python 3.11 .venv-science && . .venv-science/bin/activate && uv pip install -r requirements-optional-science.txt 'dedalus>=3.0.5' 'liboqs-python>=0.14.1'
scripts.probe-science: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv-science/bin/python ]; then .venv-science/bin/python scripts/probe_science_toolbelt.py; else python3 scripts/probe_science_toolbelt.py; fi'
